name: olla-machina-monorepo
description: Spec-aware model intelligence layer for Ollama

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix cli && npm install --prefix web && npm install --prefix api
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix shared && npm run build --prefix cli && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix shared && npm run test --prefix cli && npm run test --prefix web
